title: Asia Centric: BlackRock on Crypto, Tokenization and Future ETFs
title_cn: 以亚洲为中心：贝莱德谈加密货币、代币化和未来 ETF
summary: Exchange-traded funds are fundamentally reshaping how capital is allocated, skyrocketing to a $22 trillion global industry that Bloomberg Intelligence estimates will surpass $50 trillion by 2035. Investors no longer view them simply as vehicles for broad passive exposure. Instead, ETFs have evolved into portfolio “Lego blocks” used to manage cash yields, seek downside protection and access previously difficult asset classes such as Bitcoin. title: Gold Steadies as Hopes of US-Iran Truce Ease Rate-Hike Bets
title_cn: 美伊休战的希望缓解了加息押注，金价持稳
summary: Gold was little changed as optimism over efforts to end the Middle East conflict eased bets on interest-rate hikes.

title: Moody’s Cuts Mexico Credit Rating to One Notch Above Junk
title_cn: 穆迪将墨西哥信用评级下调至垃圾级以上一级
summary: Moody’s Ratings cut Mexico’s credit score to the lowest tier of investment grade, citing the country’s weakening fiscal position and stoking concern Latin America’s second-largest economy is heading toward junk status.

title: Asian Stocks to Rise as Nvidia Whipsaws on Results: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 英伟达业绩不佳，亚洲股市上涨：市场结束
summary: Asian equities were set to climb Thursday after gains on Wall Street that reflected a constructive outlook for US-Iran talks. Nvidia Corp. shares whipsawed in a lukewarm response to its sales forecast.

title: SoftBank-Backed Firm to File for IPO on Data Center Ambition
title_cn: 软银支持的公司将因数据中心野心申请首次公开募股
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.-backed digital infrastructure firm SB Energy Corp. plans to file a confidential draft registration statement for a proposed initial public offering in the US, the company said in a Wednesday statement.

title: Mounting Exporter Strain Risks Complicating China’s Yuan Policy
title_cn: 出口商紧张风险加剧使中国人民币政策复杂化
summary: The yuan’s continued strength is exerting pressure on Chinese exporters on a scale rarely seen in recent years, complicating Beijing’s efforts to manage the pace of currency gains.

title: Musk Ally Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 马斯克盟友格雷西亚斯有望通过 SpaceX IPO 赚取数十亿美元
summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential Said to Near Mega-REIT Tie-Up
title_cn: AvalonBay 股权住宅据称接近大型房地产投资信托基金合作
summary: AvalonBay Communities Inc. and Equity Residential are nearing a deal that will see two of the biggest real estate investment trusts by value combine, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Oil Edges Up After Plunging on Optimism Over US-Iran Agreement
title_cn: 美伊协议乐观情绪暴跌后油价小幅上涨
summary: Oil inched higher after plummeting on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” with Iran.

title: Bridging Finance Founder David Sharpe Seeks New Appeal in Fraud Case
title_cn: Bridging Finance 创始人 David Sharpe 在欺诈案中寻求新的上诉
summary: The former chief executive officer of private credit shop Bridging Finance Inc. will ask Ontario’s highest court to review a fresh ruling that upheld fraud findings against him.

title: Scion Group & Ares Management Team Up to Buy $910M in Student Housing
title_cn: Scion Group 与 Ares 管理团队联手购买 9.1 亿美元的学生宿舍
summary: Scion Group CEO Rob Bronstein said that his team is targeting real estate around universities that represent a 'strong return on investment' in terms of tuition, as his company announces a deal with Ares Management to but  $910M in student housing properties. Bronstein, joined by Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda, said that his investment is aimed at providing a wide net of locations and price points in the student housing market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会主席阿特金斯对预测市场基金踩刹车
summary: The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch.

title: Reeves to Set Out UK Cost of Living Plan to Cushion Iran War Hit
title_cn: 里夫斯将制定英国生活成本计划以缓冲伊朗战争的影响
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves will detail a package of measures to ease cost-of-living pressures on Thursday, as the British government tries to limit the impact of the Iran war.

title: Codelco Eyes $2 Billion Gain From Unifying Copper Mines in Chile
title_cn: Codelco 希望通过统一智利铜矿获得 20 亿美元收益
summary: Codelco is seeking a combined $2 billion in cost savings and additional revenue by integrating the operations of three copper mines as the state-owned Chilean company tries to offset the impact of stagnating output and rising debt.

title: SpaceX Files for IPO on Nasdaq Under SPCX Symbol
title_cn: SpaceX 申请在纳斯达克进行首次公开​​募股（IPO），代码为 SPCX
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX has filed papers to go public on the Nasdaq under the symbol SPCX. SpaceX is targeting as much as $75 billion in its listing at a valuation of more than $2 trillion, people familiar with the matter have said. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks, Bonds Climb as Oil Falls on US-Iran Hopes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国和伊朗的希望导致油价下跌，股市和债券上涨：市场结束
summary: A slide in oil prices lifted stocks and bonds amid hopes for a deal to end a war that has rattled financial markets and fueled inflation worries. In late hours, Nvidia Corp. whipsawed after its results.

title: SpaceX’s $20.7 Billion in 2025 CapEx Fueled by AI, Spacecraft
title_cn: 人工智能、航天器推动 SpaceX 2025 年资本支出达 207 亿美元
summary: SpaceX facilities in Hawthorne, California. Photographer: Ethan Swope/Bloomberg

title: Emerging Currencies Post Gains as Iran War Hopes Gain Traction
title_cn: 伊朗战争希望增强，新兴货币上涨
summary: Emerging-market currencies rallied Wednesday, paring losses the day before, as oil prices tumbled on optimism over the outlook for the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Bitcoin Grows More Dependent on Saylor’s Buying Machine
title_cn: 比特币越来越依赖塞勒的购买机器
summary: For most of its history, Bitcoin’s price was driven by a sprawling cast of buyers: idealists, speculators, early adopters, and, more recently, institutional investors looking for a new portfolio hedge. Demand was fragmented and hard to predict. In 2026, it is neither.

title: US Seeks to Boost Energy Exports to India as Rubio Visits Delhi
title_cn: 卢比奥访问德里，美国寻求增加对印度的能源出口
summary: The Trump administration wants to boost energy exports to India, the US ambassador in New Delhi said on Wednesday, ahead of a multi-day visit by Secretary of State Marco Rubio to the world’s most populous country.

title: Oil & Gas M&A Heats Up With $20 Billion of Assets in Play
title_cn: 石油与天然气天然气并购升温，资产规模达 200 亿美元
summary: Buyout shops are finding a rare exit opportunity in the US oil patch.

title: US Treasuries Rebound on Optimism for US-Iran Deal Progress
title_cn: 美国国债因美伊协议进展乐观而反弹
summary: Treasuries surged on investor optimism that the US and Iran were working toward a deal that could ease a rise in global energy prices that has fanned fears around inflation.

title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67B to Form Power Giant
title_cn: NextEra 以 67B 美元收购 Dominion 组建电力巨头
summary: Bloomberg's David Carnevali joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." NextEra Energy agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Minutes Show More Officials Warned of Rate-Hike Scenario
title_cn: 美联储会议纪要显示更多官员对加息情景发出警告
summary: A majority of Federal Reserve officials warned the central bank would likely need to consider raising interest rates if inflation continued to run persistently above their 2% target, minutes of the April 28-29 Federal Open Market Committee meeting showed. Mike McKee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Is Preparing to File for an IPO in the Coming Weeks
title_cn: OpenAI 准备在未来几周内申请 IPO
summary: OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming weeks and is targeting a public debut sometime in the fall. The exact timing remains uncertain. The ChatGPT creator, co-founded by Sam Altman, is one of the world's most valuable and powerful AI companies. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow has all the details. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls as Trump Says US Is in ‘Final Stages’ With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国与伊朗的关系已进入“最后阶段”，油价下跌
summary: Oil plummeted after US President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” with Iran, raising expectations for a near-term restart of energy flows through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Low Dollar Volatility Forces FX Traders Into Carry, Value
title_cn: 美元波动性较低迫使外汇交易者进行套利、价值交易
summary: A sharp drop in volatility in the US dollar is pushing traders in the $9.5-trillion-a-day currency market toward carry wagers and bets on relative value in search of profits.

title: More Private Cos. Getting Acquired: Evercore's Kiely
title_cn: 更多私人公司被收购：Evercore 的 Kiely
summary: Tammy Kiely, senior managing director in technology investment banking at Evercore, and Wally Cheng, head of global technology M&A at Morgan Stanley, join Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Tells Skeptical Investors That AI Is Ready to Go Mainstream
title_cn: 英伟达告诉持怀疑态度的投资者，人工智能已准备好成为主流
summary: Nvidia Corp., facing more investor skepticism, used its latest quarterly report to tout progress in diversifying the company, which aims to rely less on the giant data center operators that have fueled its runaway growth.

title: Samsung Reaches 11th-Hour Deal With Union to Avoid Strike
title_cn: 三星与工会达成避免罢工的 11 小时协议
summary: In a last-minute reversal, Samsung Electronics Co. reached a tentative deal with its labor union, averting a potentially crippling strike that had been scheduled to start Thursday at the world’s largest memory chipmaker.

title: Nvidia Beats Expectations, But Fails to Impress Investors
title_cn: 英伟达超出预期，但未能打动投资者
summary: Nvidia delivered a sales forecast of about $91 billion for the three months ending in July, but drew a lukewarm reaction from investors. Ed Ludlow breaks down the company's earnings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Baillie Gifford, Layer Global Add $200 Million to Kalshi Funding
title_cn: Baillie Gifford 和 Layer Global 向 Kalshi 基金追加 2 亿美元
summary: Kalshi Inc. raised an additional $200 million from two new investors, broadening a funding round that had already brought in $1 billion, according to a person familiar with the situation.

title: SpaceX to Reward Musk for Mars Colony With 1 Million People
title_cn: SpaceX 将奖励马斯克建设 100 万人的火星殖民地
summary: SpaceX Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk can boost his overall compensation if the company succeeds in building colonies on Mars and data centers in space, according to a US Securities and Exchange Commission filing on Wednesday.

title: OpenAI Faces IPO Unknowns Even After Victory Over Musk
title_cn: 即使战胜了马斯克，OpenAI 的 IPO 仍面临未知数
summary: The ChatGPT maker is pushing ahead with a public offering after a judge dismissed Musk’s case against it

title: Musk’s SpaceX Files Publicly for Nasdaq IPO
title_cn: 马斯克的 SpaceX 公开提交纳斯达克 IPO 申请
summary: SpaceX filed publicly for its initial public offering, moving Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company a step closer to delivering the world’s biggest-ever debut. Ed Ludlow has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Has Spent More Than $15 Billion on Starship Rocket
title_cn: SpaceX 已在星舰火箭上花费超过 150 亿美元
summary: SpaceX said it has sunk more than $15 billion into developing its massive Starship rocket, which is manufactured and launched out of its Starbase facility in South Texas.

title: Anthropic to Pay SpaceX Nearly $45 Billion for Computing Deal
title_cn: Anthropic 将向 SpaceX 支付近 450 亿美元的计算交易费用
summary: Anthropic PBC has agreed to pay Elon Musk’s SpaceX nearly $45 billion over the next three years for computing resources as part of an expanded deal to support its Claude artificial intelligence software, according to a securities filing.

title: Wells Fargo Hires Three Tech Investment Bankers from Rivals
title_cn: 富国银行从竞争对手中聘请了三名科技投资银行家
summary: Wells Fargo & Co. has hired a trio of bankers who focus on the technology sector from rivals Citigroup Inc., Bank of America Corp. and Deutsche Bank AG, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk’s SpaceX Files Publicly for Nasdaq IPO Under Symbol SPCX
title_cn: 马斯克的 SpaceX 公开提交纳斯达克 IPO 申请，股票代码为 SPCX
summary: SpaceX filed publicly for its initial public offering, moving Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company a step closer to delivering the world’s biggest-ever debut. Anthony Hughes, Bloomberg News Equity Capital Markets Reporter joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic on Pace for First Profitable Quarter as Revenue Surges
title_cn: 随着收入激增，Anthropic 将迎来第一个盈利季度
summary: Anthropic PBC is on pace for its first profitable quarter after experiencing a surge in revenue driven by demand for its artificial intelligence software.

title: The Key Takeaways From Nvidia's Earnings and Forecast
title_cn: 英伟达收益和预测的主要要点
summary: Gabelli Funds Growth Portfolios Managing Director John Belton gives his initial reaction to Nvidia's first-quarter earnings report and forecast on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sergey Brin Funds Opposition to San Francisco ‘Overpaid’ CEO Tax
title_cn: 谢尔盖·布林资助反对旧金山“多付”首席执行官税
summary: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is continuing to push deeper into California politics by donating to a group that opposes a proposed tax hike on businesses with highly-paid executives in San Francisco.

title: Nvidia Beats on Earnings, Revenue Projected at $91 Billion
title_cn: Nvidia 盈利好于预期，收入预计达 910 亿美元
summary: Nvidia reports earnings of $1.87 per share for the fiscal 1Q topping estimates of $1.77. Revenue for the quarter ending in July is projected to be $91 billion, compared with Wall Street estimates of about $87.4 billion. Bloomberg's Romaine Bostick and Matt Bryson of Wedbush Securities discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Gives Lackluster Forecast as Chip Competition Mounts
title_cn: 随着芯片竞争的加剧，英伟达的预测黯淡
summary: Nvidia, the world’s most valuable company, disappointed investors with its latest sales forecast, adding to concerns about growing competition in the AI chip industry. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Growth Is Sustainable, Redpoint's Brescia Says
title_cn: Redpoint 的 Brescia 表示，Nvidia 的增长是可持续的
summary: Erica Brescia, Redpoint Ventures managing director, reacts to Nvidia's first-quarter earnings report and explains why she is still bullish on the stock. She speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazilian President Moves to Tighten Rules on Big Tech, Social Media Content
title_cn: 巴西总统采取行动收紧对大型科技和社交媒体内容的规则
summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva issued two decrees tightening rules for social media and digital platforms in Latin America’s largest economy, escalating the government’s push to curb hate speech, misinformation and online crime.

title: Airbnb Expands Into Car Rentals, Food, Hotels
title_cn: Airbnb 进军汽车租赁、餐饮、酒店领域
summary: Airbnb Chief Executive Officer Brian Chesky says he's trying to build "an ecosystem of services" for customers. The company will help guests arrange for luggage storage, food delivery and car rentals. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Chips Still Behind US, Nvidia in Performance: Baillie Gifford
title_cn: Baillie Gifford：中国芯片的性能仍落后于美国和英伟达
summary: Paulina McPadden, investment manager of international concentrated growth strategy at Baillie Gifford, discusses where Nvidia sits in the global chip ecosystem and why US-based AI researchers and companies still have a leg up for the long-term over China, while still seeing a "rich hunting ground" for AI investment outside of the US. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Earnings in Focus; SpaceX Eyes Historic IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/20/2026
title_cn: 英伟达盈利成为焦点； SpaceX 着眼于历史性的 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 20 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down what to expect from Nvidia's earnings report, as investors anxiously await for the world’s most valuable company to show whether it can continue delivering the explosive growth fueling the AI boom. Plus, SpaceX inches closer to launch with an imminent IPO filing. And, a deep dive into SoftBank's bet on OpenAI as insiders grow worried that Masayoshi Son is too tied to the AI giant. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Major Chatbots Miss the Mark on News: Forum AI Study
title_cn: 主要聊天机器人在新闻上未达标：论坛人工智能研究
summary: The four major chatbots — OpenAI’s ChatGPT, Google’s Gemini, Anthropic’s Claude and xAI’s Grok — are struggling to fairly and accurately answer questions about elections and geopolitics, according to a new study from Forum AI. Forum AI CEO Campbell Brown believes AI companies will have to be different and stop "grading their own homework" for things to change. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Founder’s Starstruck Bet on OpenAI Raises Concern
title_cn: 软银创始人对 OpenAI 的追捧引发关注
summary: SoftBank has committed more than $60 billion to OpenAI to date, with founder Masayoshi Son reportedly convinced Sam Altman is leading the most important technology shift of the century. But as rival Anthropic gains ground, questions are growing - even inside SoftBank - about whether the company may be too heavily tied to OpenAI's success. Bloomberg's Peter Elstrom joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Need to Fill US Manufacturing Gap Long-Term, Says Amca CEO
title_cn: Amca 首席执行官表示，需要长期填补美国制造业缺口
summary: Amca, which offers an integrated platform to rapidly develop and manufacture critical aerospace and defense components, announced a $300 million Series B valuing the company at more than $1 billion. Amca CEO Jai Malik joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Airbnb’s Chesky Says US ‘Misunderstanding’ Use of Chinese Open-Source AI Models
title_cn: Airbnb 的切斯基称美国“误解”了中国开源人工智能模型的使用
summary: Airbnb Inc. Chief Executive Officer Brian Chesky defended his company’s use of Chinese artificial intelligence models, saying US lawmakers who worry Chinese firms can access Americans’ user data are “misunderstanding” the technology.

title: Financing for AI Requires Creativity: Morgan Stanley's Cheng
title_cn: 人工智能融资需要创造力：摩根士丹利的程
summary: Wally Cheng, head of global technology M&A at Morgan Stanley, and Tammy Kiely, senior managing director in technology investment banking at Evercore, join Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bolivia to Overhaul Cabinet as Highway Blockades Strangle La Paz
title_cn: 高速公路封锁扼杀拉巴斯 玻利维亚将彻底改革内阁
summary: Bolivian President Rodrigo Paz said he’ll reshuffle his cabinet to bring it “closer” to the population, as food, fuel and medicine run low in major cities amid a blockade by protesters.

title: Officials Warned of Rate-Hike if Inflation Persists | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/20/2026
title_cn: 官员警告称，如果通胀持续存在，将加息彭博商业周刊日报 5/20/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Mike McKee reports from the Federal Reserve as the committee releases the minutes of its last meeting, where officials warned the central bank could need to raise rates if inflation continued to run persistently above the 2% target. Then, Bloomberg Technology host Ed Ludlow breaks down new reporting on a potential IPO for artificial intelligence giant OpenAI. Plus, Bloomberg's Myles Miller on US charges against Cuba's Raul Castro ratcheting up tensions between the two countries. Then, Bloomberg's Alex Semenova and Thomas Thornton discuss his bearish stance and what risks are most pressing to the market. Finally, Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda and Scion Group CEO Rob Bronstein on Scion's deal with Ares Management to buy $910M in student housing properties. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A $10 Billion Banking Scandal Is Tainting Brazil’s Elite
title_cn: 价值 100 亿美元的银行丑闻正在玷污巴西的精英阶层
summary: The saga has sent corruption back to the top of voters’ concerns and the fallout will help decide who becomes the next leader of Latin America’s largest economy.

title: El colapso de Banco Master altera la carrera presidencial entre Lula y Flávio Bolsonaro
title_cn: 马斯特银行的倒闭改变了卢拉和弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗之间的总统竞选
summary: El escándalo de Banco Master sitúa nuevamente la corrupción entre las principales preocupaciones de los votantes, y sus repercusiones podrían ayudar a decidir quién se convertirá en el próximo líder de la mayor economía de América Latina.

title: Caso Master abala o país e sacode a corrida eleitoral
title_cn: 重大案件震动了整个国家并震动了选举竞赛
summary: A crise do Banco Master recolocou a corrupção no topo das preocupações dos eleitores e seus desdobramentos podem influenciar quem comandará o Brasil

title: Democrats See Opening as Trump Shows Weakness Outside MAGA Core
title_cn: 民主党人认为特朗普在 MAGA 核心之外表现出弱点，因此开放
summary: Disapproval from Independents shows a narrowing of the GOP base.

title: Trump Flexes Grip Over GOP | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/20/2026
title_cn: 特朗普对共和党施以控制|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 20 日
summary:
On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss Tuesday's primary elections. On today's show, Joe and Kailey are live from Georgia Tech in Atlanta. They speak with former US Ambassador to the United Nations Andrew Young, Georgia Tech Professor Rachel Whitlark and Aflac Senior Vice President Keith Farley.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Renews Pressure as Iran Vows Retaliation Beyond Mideast
title_cn: 伊朗誓言在中东以外地区进行报复，特朗普再次施压
summary: The US and Iran traded threats of escalation on Wednesday as the weeks-long stalemate in the Middle East dragged on without resolution.

title: US Charges Cuba’s Raúl Castro With Murder in 1996 Shootdown
title_cn: 美国指控古巴劳尔·卡斯特罗在 1996 年击落事件中谋杀
summary: The US charged former Cuban President Raúl Castro with murder, intensifying a standoff with Havana as the Trump administration attempts to force change on the island after nearly seven decades of communist rule.

title: Trump Says No Escalation Coming on Cuba
title_cn: 特朗普称古巴局势不会升级
summary: President Donald Trump plays down the need to further ratchet up pressure on the Cuban government after the US charged the country’s former president, Raúl Castro, with murder. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Winning Streak Masks Widening Cracks Outside His Base
title_cn: 特朗普的连胜掩盖了他的基地之外日益扩大的裂痕
summary: Donald Trump’s political team was full of bravado on Wednesday following its winning streak in recent Republican primaries in Kentucky, Louisiana and Indiana, contests that put on display the president’s lasting hold over his Make America Great Again base.

title: Trump Downplays Need for More Cuba Pressure After Castro Charge
title_cn: 卡斯特罗指控后，特朗普淡化了对古巴施加更多压力的必要性
summary: President Donald Trump played down the need to further ratchet up pressure on the Cuban government after the US charged the country’s former president, Raúl Castro, with murder.

title: There's a 'Judgment Day Coming' For Our Country Says Andrew Young
title_cn: 安德鲁·杨说，我们国家的“审判日即将到来”
summary: Andrew Young, former US UN ambassador and civil rights activist, joined Balance of Power to discuss the election results in Georgia and the current political climate. Young said whether it's the midterms this year or the 2028 election, voters are going to deliver a judgment on the current direction of the country. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Threatens to Retaliate Beyond Middle East If US Attacks
title_cn: 如果美国发动袭击，伊朗威胁将在中东以外地区进行报复
summary: Iran warned it would retaliate beyond the Middle East if the US or Israel attacks it again, following renewed threats from President Donald Trump. Rachel Whitlark, Georgia Tech Sam Nunn School of International Affairs Associate Professor joins Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Orban’s Return to Power Set to Be Ruled Out by New Term Limits
title_cn: 新任期限制将排除欧尔班重返权力的可能
summary: Hungary’s ruling party introduced a constitutional amendment limiting prime ministerial terms to eight years, effectively barring previous incumbent Viktor Orban from ever returning to the position.

title: Chile's Big Economic Bill Clears Another Hurdle as Kast Seeks to Drive Growth
title_cn: 卡斯特寻求推动增长，智利的庞大经济法案扫清了另一个障碍
summary: Chile’s lower house of Congress approved President José Antonio Kast’s flagship economic bill that his administration is counting on to drive growth in one of Latin America’s richest nations.

title: KKR Consortium Warns White House of ‘Bias’ in $10 Billion Argentina Auction
title_cn: KKR 财团警告白宫在 100 亿美元的阿根廷拍卖中存在“偏见”
summary: A consortium of dredging companies backed by KKR & Co. complained to the White House of unfair conditions in bidding for a pivotal contract in Argentina, calling on the US for “timely engagement.”

title: Trump Flexes Grip Over GOP During Primary Night
title_cn: 特朗普在初选之夜对共和党施压
summary: President Trump and the candidates he endorsed in the congressional primary had a good night on Tuesday. But, as Tyler Kendall asks, will it be enough to keep control of the House and Senate come November? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Charges Former Cuban Leader Raúl Castro With Murder
title_cn: 美国指控古巴前领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗谋杀
summary: Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche made the announcement Wednesday in Miami. The charges stem from the downing of two civilian aircraft in 1996. They were operated by a Florida-based exile group called Brothers to the Rescue. Bloomberg's Myles Miller reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will Democrats Flip the Senate This Fall?
title_cn: 民主党今年秋天会推翻参议院吗？
summary: Democrats have a shot at flipping the Senate in the midterms this fall. But it won’t be easy, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist David M. Drucker. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jeff Bezos Says New York City Second-Home Tax Is ‘Fine’ Idea
title_cn: 杰夫·贝佐斯表示纽约市第二居所税是“好”主意
summary: Amazon.com Inc. founder Jeff Bezos expressed support for New York’s plan to impose a new tax on luxury second homes in the city, noting that higher levies on out-of-towners is a reasonable way to raise revenue.

title: US Marines Board and Release Another Iran-Flagged Tanker
title_cn: 美国海军陆战队登上并释放另一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的油轮
summary: The US military boarded and later released an Iranian-flagged oil tanker in the Gulf of Oman, keeping up pressure on Tehran’s economy as President Donald Trump presses for a deal to end their conflict.

title: EU Expedites Start of US Trade Deal in Bow to Trump Demand
title_cn: 欧盟应特朗普要求加快启动美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union finalized the text of its long-delayed US trade deal after months of negotiations, clearing a major hurdle to ratifying the pact before President Donald Trump’s threatened deadline to impose higher tariffs.

title: Housing Affordability Bill Advances After Provision Scrapped
title_cn: 住房负担能力法案在取消条款后推进
summary: The most sweeping housing legislation in a generation advanced in Congress after a contentious provision was removed and the White House offered its endorsement, sending the bill back to the Senate.

title: Trump Flexes Grip Over GOP With Massie’s Defeat in Kentucky
title_cn: 特朗普因马西在肯塔基州的失败而对共和党施以控制
summary: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for a congressional seat in Northern Kentucky, Ed Gallrein, defeated the president’s nemesis and longtime GOP House member Thomas Massie in one of the most expensive primaries on record.

title: US Treasury Sanctions Drug Traffickers For Laundering Profits via Crypto
title_cn: 美国财政部制裁通过加密货币洗钱的毒贩
summary: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions against an operative for the Sinaloa Cartel who it says uses cryptocurrency to funnel drug-trafficking proceeds back into Mexico.

title: EU Countries Summon Israeli Ambassadors Over Activist Treatment
title_cn: 欧盟国家就激进分子待遇召见以色列大使
summary: Belgium, the Netherlands and Italy summoned Israel’s ambassadors over the treatment of activists detained by Israel after seeking to breach its naval blockade of Gaza in a flotilla.
